summary: Enable confirmed DFM RPC write-back into ResQ.
details: Updating the remote DFM through RPC now asks for an additional confirmation before using ResQ write access.
When the local DFM JSON is newer, the comparison window shows `Update Remote DFM` for the Local card.
Confirmed `SyncDFM` requests include the local DFM JSON path so `arcrho_bridge` can write excluded ratios, selected formulas, and notes back into the ResQ DFM method and return a status JSON.
